description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the femtopixel/multiarchbuilder Docker image with a docker:dind service and sets the DOCKER_HOST variable to tcp://docker:2375. Define a single stage called build and a job named build that runs only on the master branch. In the build job's before_script, execute `echo "$DOCKER_HUB_PASSWORD" | docker login -u "$DOCKER_HUB_LOGIN" --password-stdin` and `docker buildx create --driver=docker-container --name=buildkit-builder --use`. Then in the script step run `make`. No caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
